title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 28 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 28 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 28 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 28/08/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 0.85% today, the main contract closed at 812.5.The traders' willingness to ship is general.The steel mills are active to purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is less. PBF at Shandong port deal 885-886 yuan/mt,decrease 7-9 yuan/mt. PBF at Tangshan port deal 890 yuan/mt,decrease 3 yuan/mt.
